narrative:
Union (precinct in Madison County) has 975 registered voters, with 50.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.9 percentage points.
